case_title: LAURA HAVLEK ET AL VS. PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF SEP-14-2022 CONTINUED TO JAN-18-2023 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR STATUS REPORT RE BANKRUPTCY OR COORDINATION STATUS. ***NOTE: PLEASE COMPLY WITH CRC 3.529.*** NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JAN-18-2023 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100183711)
